comment: The new checkout UI is much cleaner!
It took 10 seconds to load the payment page.
Checkout failed twice with a 500 error.
I like the colors, but where is my order history?
Faster than the old version for me!
Getting frequent 'Something went wrong' messages during checkout.
App keeps crashing on the final step.
Finally, a one-click buy option!
Latency is killing the experience. Fix the lag!
Payment button doesn't respond sometimes.
Great update, love the ease of use.
Stuck on the loading spinner for minutes.
I tried to buy 3 times, gave up. Switching to a competitor.
It's okay, but feels a bit heavy.
Errors every time I try to add a new card.
The animations are smooth.
Mobile app is burning my battery since the update.
I can't see the 'Apply Coupon' field anymore.
Wait time is too high. Not worth it.
The checkout flow is broken for guest users.
Very intuitive layout.
Page failed to load. 404 on checkout route?
I lost my cart items after the login prompt.
Support was quick to help, but the bug persists.
Service unavailable message popped up twice.
Too slow to be usable during peak hours.
Way better than the previous version.
Transaction timed out but money was deducted?
Why did you remove the PayPal option?
The loading bar just stops at 90%.
Love the new dark mode in checkout.
Can't complete payment on iOS 14.
Android app crashes on splash screen.
Average experience, nothing special.
The font size is too small for accessibility.
Refund process for failed checkout is a nightmare.
Solid update, zero issues for me.
Checkout is laggy on high-end devices too.
I'm getting 'Invalid Session' errors constantly.
Total mess. Roll it back please.
